rejects_out_of_scope_tasks.description: Agent MUST reject when task does not fall within backend/server-side development scope
rejects_out_of_scope_tasks.observable_check: execution_log contains 'REJECTION' AND query contains out-of-scope task AND agent did not dispatch to backend-developer

rejects_write_boundary_violation.description: Agent MUST reject when task requires modifying files outside declared write boundary
rejects_write_boundary_violation.observable_check: execution_log contains 'REJECTION' AND (query requests file outside write boundary OR execution_log shows modification of file outside write boundary) AND agent did not modify

rejects_green_phase_without_red_tests.description: Agent MUST reject green-phase or refactor-phase dispatch without failing red tests
rejects_green_phase_without_red_tests.observable_check: execution_log contains 'REJECTION' AND (query mentions green/refactor phase AND no red tests exist) AND agent did not implement

returns_explicit_rejection_statement.description: Agent MUST return an explicit Rejection statement at the top of the response
returns_explicit_rejection_statement.observable_check: execution_log contains pattern 'REJECTION' or 'REJECTED' at response start

states_reason_for_rejection.description: Agent MUST state the reason citing specific rejection condition(s) violated
states_reason_for_rejection.observable_check: execution_log contains 'Reason:' or 'reason:' followed by specific condition reference

confirms_no_modifications.description: Agent MUST confirm explicitly that no code, files, or workspace artifacts have been modified
confirms_no_modifications.observable_check: execution_log contains 'no code' OR 'no files' OR 'no artifacts have been modified' OR 'not modified'

does_not_begin_before_checklist_passes.description: Agent MUST NOT begin implementation before dispatch brief passes acceptance checklist
does_not_begin_before_checklist_passes.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains implementation AND acceptance_checklist_failed) — no implementation before checklist passes

does_not_modify_outside_write_boundary.description: Agent MUST NOT modify files outside declared write boundary
does_not_modify_outside_write_boundary.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains edit/write to file AND file is outside write boundary)

does_not_expand_scope.description: Agent MUST NOT expand scope beyond dispatched vertical slice
does_not_expand_scope.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains implementation beyond dispatched slice)
